_publications._publicationTitle: Unmasking Intra-tumoral Heterogeneity and Clonal Evolution in NF1-MPNST.

_contextSnippet: RNA sequencing of the three sample sites was performed...Distinct gene expression profiles were observed in each of the areas sampled...Distinct copy number signatures can be appreciated in each of the three samples
details: Successfully performed whole exome sequencing and RNA sequencing to identify distinct gene expression profiles and copy number signatures across three tumor areas
